title: Connection issues in Grand Theft Auto V

evidence.content: I have loved this game for over a decade. Still own it for the xbox 360. Awesome story and gameplay! Don't really care for the separate online. It's ehh. Super grindy with not much to show for it, held up by youths. Especially since you abandoned the main game for over a decade with nothing new!!! N

Story mode is a 10/10.

Online though:

Customer support is ♥♥♥♥♥♥♥♥. Non malicious glitches to get cosmetics that rockstar refuses to give us get patched for no reason. Updates are seldom fun/enjoyable enough to spend the money or spend the time required to partake in them. Outfits and cars the
